commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
Adds QMD archived Markdown transcript stem restoration in the session transcript hit parser plus SDK parser and memory-core visibility regression tests for slugified reset/deleted session paths.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main parses archived `.md` session paths as non-archived plain stems, and the visibility filter drops session hits whose stems do not resolve to session keys. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can extend the parser and tests to cover the missing exported archive Markdown filename form without changing policy or QMD manager behavior.

target.title: fix(memory): recognize QMD-normalized archived session transcript paths
target.author: tanshanshan

commands.reason: author association CONTRIBUTOR and repository permission none are not allowed
